root.name: Money Creek
root.desc: Real survey imported from onX — boulders, areas, and approaches across the Money Creek drainage.

children.name: Money Creek Main
children.desc: Roadside and right-side blocks along the creek.

children.name: GameCube
children.desc: Cluster of cube-shaped blocks — the GameCube boulders and neighbors.

children.name: Uphill Boulders
children.desc: Scattered blocks up the hillside, still being scouted.

children.name: DotA Boulders
children.desc: Parent zone for the Dota-themed boulders on the right side of Money Creek.

children.name: Dire Boulders
children.desc: Boulders reached by the approach trail in the DotA zone, including the cave and lower-right clusters.

boulders.name: nice boulder to left of possible new trail to mid cluster

children.name: Radiant Boulders
children.desc: Creekside Dota-themed boulders including Brewmaster, Invoker, Tusk, and neighboring blocks.
